expectations.text: Response includes .room() with an example value
expectations.evidence: note("c e g b").s("piano").room(0.8) — .room() is shown with value 0.8

expectations.text: Response includes .delay() with an example value
expectations.evidence: note("c e g b").s("piano").delay(0.6).delaytime(0.25).delayfeedback(0.5) — .delay() shown with value 0.6

expectations.text: Response explains what the room or delay value controls (e.g., amount, 0-1)
expectations.evidence: '.room(N) sets reverb level from 0 (dry) to 1 (fully wet)' and '.delay(N) sets delay wet level (0–1)'

expectations.text: Response contains a code example using note("c e g b").s("piano") with room and/or delay chained
